title: German Potato Salad
description: A classic German potato salad with crispy bacon, tangy fermented flavor, and a hint of Ukrainian twist.
instructions: Boil the potatoes in salted water for 10-12 minutes or until tender.
In a pan, cook the crispy bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the sliced Ukrainian sausage and cook until browned.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, crispy bacon mixture, chopped fermented pickles, and salad dressing.
Toss to combine and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
